title: AMD security advisory (AV26-355)
description: On April 14, 2026, AMD published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: AMD EPYC Processors  multiple versions and models
AMD Ryzen Processors  multiple versions and models
AMD Ryzen Embedded Processors  multiple versions and models
AMD EPYC Embedded Processors  multiple versions and models
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
